markdown_formatted:
## Meeting purpose

[Review and provide feedback on editors' work, focusing on article formatting and content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Editors need to improve link integration, formatting, and adherence to style guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Quality control process: editors will correct their own work, then QA each other's articles](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Critical issues: TLDR formatting, meta title/description character limits, CTA placement](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Importance of thorough double-checking before submission emphasized](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

## Topics

### Article Structure and Formatting

  - [Remove auto-generated titles; only include title in designated field](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [Ensure proper H2/H3 formatting for headings](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [TLDR section should have bullet points and be placed before table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Payroll CTA should be italicized and placed strategically](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Avoid large blocks of text; use H3 tags for sections over 250 words](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

### Link Integration

  - [Remove "tip" sections and integrate links naturally into relevant paragraphs](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Ensure links are working and relevant to the content](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Distribute links throughout the article, not just at the bottom](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Meta Information

  - [Meta title: 15-60 characters](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Meta description: 140-150 characters](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Copy-paste generated title into the correct field](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

### Content Quality

  - [Remove generic introductions (e.g., "What is payroll in Alabama?")](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Delete irrelevant case studies or examples generated by AI](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Ensure slug is simple (e.g., "how-to-do-payroll-in-utah")](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

### Editing Process Demonstration

  - [Sadira walked through the editing process using a sample article](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of following all instructions and double-checking work](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Editors to correct their own work based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Sadira to assign QA partners for cross-checking articles](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Editors to double-check all submitted articles for compliance with guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
  - [Sadira to send recording of the meeting to the group](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Editors to notify Sadira upon completion of revisions](https://fathom.video/share/VvTRCHstkSV8QWjsySgpk4QzKFpukLod?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
